context: Private lesson — barre focus: pliés, fondu, rond en l'air

corrections.text: Don't go so low in grand plié
Shoulders don't come forward in grand plié
Core engaged, don't collapse in grand plié
Coupé low on top of ankle — not riding up the leg
Find resistance at the fondu to demi-pointe
Thigh leads — not heel or foot
Lengthen supporting side in second and derrière
Leg directly behind hip in derrière
Sequence: fondu + attitude first, then demi-pointe
Right foot not fully up on demi-pointe
Sharper coming in on rond en l'air
More resistance on the extend in rond en l'air

progress.text: Heels arriving together in coordination exercise — confirmed fixed

homeExercises.name: Bird dog — one arm to fifth, second, by the thigh, back to tabletop
homeExercises.notes: Core and back strength. Keep pelvis stable throughout

homeExercises.name: Plank with rocking weight forward and back
homeExercises.notes: Full body stability. Don't let hips drop or rise

homeExercises.name: Cobra / seal / back extension
homeExercises.notes: Keep head and neck in line with the body throughout — don't crank the neck

homeExercises.name: Glute engagement pressing up into upper back extension, then arm to low arabesque
homeExercises.notes: Engages lats and shoulder blades. Shoulder blades pinned down and back throughout
